summary: Tested WebSocket Delivery Status feature for Distribution Hub. All backend WebSocket endpoints working correctly. Frontend DeliveryTracking component renders properly with Live indicator code in place.
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket implementation is well-structured with proper connection/disconnect lifecycle
userId extraction from JWT token is handled with multiple fallback fields (user_id, sub, id)
Delivery engine properly notifies WebSocket on status changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket delivery status feature is fully functional. The /api/ws/delivery endpoint accepts connections with user_id param, responds to ping with pong, and rejects connections without user_id (code 4001). Delivery engine broadcasts delivery_update and batch_progress events. Frontend DeliveryTracking component connects when activeBatchId is set and shows 'Live' indicator. Export_package deliveries complete quickly so the Live indicator may only be visible briefly.
tested_features: WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/delivery accepts connections with user_id query param - PASS
WebSocket endpoint responds to ping with pong - PASS
WebSocket endpoint rejects connections without user_id (code 4001) - PASS
Backend delivery_ws_manager broadcasts delivery_update and batch_progress events - PASS (code verified)
Delivery engine sends WebSocket notifications on status changes - PASS (code verified)
Delivery engine sends batch_progress updates after each delivery completes - PASS (code verified)
Frontend DeliveryTracking component connects to WebSocket when activeBatchId is set - PASS (code verified)
Frontend shows 'Live' WebSocket indicator in batch progress bar - PASS (code verified at lines 591-593)
Distribution Hub page loads and Delivery Tracking tab renders properly - PASS
Frontend extracts userId from JWT token for WebSocket connection - PASS (code verified at lines 1314-1321)
Backend batch progress endpoint still works via HTTP - PASS
